What a lovely weather.

We’re here to attend Data Innovation Summit, a well established conference bringing together professionals from the fields of #data, #artificialintelligence, #machinelearning, #analytics and many others.

And our mission? To learn, educate, discuss, have fun and make new connections with like-minded individuals who understand the Importance of data in today’s business.

If you’re around, come say 👋🏼 and grab a cup of ☕️ to stand E19.

{"data": [{"caption": "Did you know?

The New Year’s Eve countdown is accompanied by the chimes of Big Ben, and a digital countdown timer is projected onto the London’s Eye centre.
This tradition was inaugurated in the year 2000 with over 107,000 attendees in 2015 - 2016.
Fireworks’ budget that year was £313,000.

Less than two months till it’s here again!
